response.justification: Strong polyglot Senior/Staff engineer with directly relevant recent AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP, agentic workflows at re:cinq) and prior high-throughput distributed systems experience at Sociomantic (millions of HTTP requests/sec). However, Python — a must-have — is absent from both the skills list and the employment history, which is a material gap for a Staff role where it's listed as core. Worth a screening conversation to verify Python depth before committing to a full loop.
strengths: Current Staff-level role building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling — direct fit for AI-native environment
Proven high-throughput distributed systems experience (Sociomantic microservices handling millions of req/sec)
Broad polyglot background with strong TypeScript, plus engineering-craft practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based)
concerns: Python not listed in skills or any prior role despite being a must-have
Heaviest distributed-systems work is 2018–2020; less evidence of recent large-scale architecture ownership
Resume light on cross-functional stakeholder management and incident/on-call specifics
